title: Virtual aggregate field via select_merge
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.posts_with_comment_count/0` that returns Post structs but with a virtual `comment_count` field computed via aggregate subquery. Approach: use `select_merge: %{comment_count: ...}` to inject the count into each Post struct. The subquery correlates on `parent_as(:post).id`. Name the outer binding `as: :post`. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: `select_merge` is rarely used; combines with correlated subquery to return enriched structs.
